cards.name: The Fool
cards.meaning_upright: New beginnings, spontaneity, and trusting the journey.
cards.meaning_reversed: Recklessness, naivety, or hesitation to start.
cards.description: A step into the unknown with openness and curiosity.

cards.name: The Magician
cards.meaning_upright: Focused intent, skillful action, and making things happen.
cards.meaning_reversed: Scattered energy, manipulation, or untapped potential.
cards.description: Aligning tools, will, and attention to create change.

cards.name: The High Priestess
cards.meaning_upright: Intuition, inner knowing, and hidden truths.
cards.meaning_reversed: Ignoring intuition, confusion, or secrets kept too long.
cards.description: A quiet invitation to listen beneath the surface.

cards.name: The Empress
cards.meaning_upright: Nurturing growth, creativity, and abundance.
cards.meaning_reversed: Creative block, neglect, or over-dependence.
cards.description: Care, beauty, and the power of cultivation.

cards.name: The Emperor
cards.meaning_upright: Structure, leadership, and stable foundations.
cards.meaning_reversed: Rigidity, control issues, or instability in authority.
cards.description: Order and protection through clear boundaries.

cards.name: The Hierophant
cards.meaning_upright: Tradition, mentorship, and shared values.
cards.meaning_reversed: Rebellion, dogma, or questioning old rules.
cards.description: Learning within a lineage of meaning and practice.

cards.name: The Lovers
cards.meaning_upright: Union, meaningful choice, and value alignment.
cards.meaning_reversed: Disharmony, misalignment, or fear of commitment.
cards.description: Choosing with the heart and living your values.

cards.name: The Chariot
cards.meaning_upright: Determination, momentum, and disciplined progress.
cards.meaning_reversed: Lack of direction, conflicting forces, or burnout.
cards.description: Harnessing opposing energies to move forward.

cards.name: Strength
cards.meaning_upright: Courage, patience, and gentle inner power.
cards.meaning_reversed: Self-doubt, impatience, or force over finesse.
cards.description: Taming fear through compassion and steadiness.

cards.name: The Hermit
cards.meaning_upright: Solitude, insight, and inner guidance.
cards.meaning_reversed: Isolation, avoidance, or refusing help.
cards.description: Stepping back to see clearly.

cards.name: Wheel of Fortune
cards.meaning_upright: Turning points, cycles, and shifts in luck.
cards.meaning_reversed: Resistance to change, delays, or repeating patterns.
cards.description: Life moves—adapt and meet the moment.

cards.name: Justice
cards.meaning_upright: Truth, fairness, and responsible choices.
cards.meaning_reversed: Bias, denial, or avoiding consequences.
cards.description: Seeing clearly and acting with integrity.

cards.name: The Hanged Man
cards.meaning_upright: Pause, surrender, and a fresh perspective.
cards.meaning_reversed: Stalling, stubbornness, or fear of letting go.
cards.description: The gift of seeing differently.

cards.name: Death
cards.meaning_upright: Endings that make room for transformation.
cards.meaning_reversed: Clinging, fear of change, or prolonged transition.
cards.description: Release what is done; renew what remains.

cards.name: Temperance
cards.meaning_upright: Balance, healing, and measured integration.
cards.meaning_reversed: Excess, imbalance, or lack of harmony.
cards.description: Blend extremes into something whole.

cards.name: The Devil
cards.meaning_upright: Attachments, temptation, and confronting the shadow.
cards.meaning_reversed: Breaking free, reclaiming power, or denial of issues.
cards.description: See the chain to loosen it.

cards.name: The Tower
cards.meaning_upright: Upheaval, revelation, and clearing false structures.
cards.meaning_reversed: Avoiding the inevitable, prolonged disruption, or fear.
cards.description: Truth strikes—rebuild on what is real.

cards.name: The Star
cards.meaning_upright: Hope, renewal, and a guiding light ahead.
cards.meaning_reversed: Discouragement, doubt, or dimmed optimism.
cards.description: A quiet yes from the future.

cards.name: The Moon
cards.meaning_upright: Uncertainty, intuition, and navigating the unknown.
cards.meaning_reversed: Clarity emerging, fear easing, or self-deception exposed.
cards.description: Not everything is clear—move by inner light.

cards.name: The Sun
cards.meaning_upright: Joy, vitality, and confident success.
cards.meaning_reversed: Temporary setbacks, pessimism, or muted confidence.
cards.description: Warmth, visibility, and truth in daylight.

cards.name: Judgement
cards.meaning_upright: Awakening, review, and answering a calling.
cards.meaning_reversed: Self-doubt, harsh judgment, or avoiding a decision.
cards.description: Choose your next chapter with honesty.

cards.name: The World
cards.meaning_upright: Completion, integration, and a sense of wholeness.
cards.meaning_reversed: Loose ends, delay, or incomplete closure.
cards.description: You arrive, and a new cycle begins.

cards.name: Ace of Wands
cards.meaning_upright: A new spark of inspiration and the urge to begin.
cards.meaning_reversed: Delays, lack of motivation, or a spark that fizzles.

cards.name: Two of Wands
cards.meaning_upright: Planning the next step and widening your horizon.
cards.meaning_reversed: Fear of the unknown or playing it too safe.

cards.name: Three of Wands
cards.meaning_upright: Expansion, progress, and results beginning to show.
cards.meaning_reversed: Delays, setbacks, or lack of follow-through.

cards.name: Four of Wands
cards.meaning_upright: Celebration, stability, and a joyful milestone.
cards.meaning_reversed: Tension at home or a celebration that feels off.

cards.name: Five of Wands
cards.meaning_upright: Competition, friction, and learning through challenge.
cards.meaning_reversed: Avoiding conflict or arguments that go nowhere.

cards.name: Six of Wands
cards.meaning_upright: Recognition, success, and earned confidence.
cards.meaning_reversed: Ego, insecurity, or success not acknowledged.

cards.name: Seven of Wands
cards.meaning_upright: Standing your ground and protecting your position.
cards.meaning_reversed: Giving up too soon or feeling overwhelmed.

cards.name: Eight of Wands
cards.meaning_upright: Speed, movement, and swift developments.
cards.meaning_reversed: Delays, miscommunication, or scattered effort.

cards.name: Nine of Wands
cards.meaning_upright: Resilience and persistence despite fatigue.
cards.meaning_reversed: Burnout, defensiveness, or refusing support.

cards.name: Ten of Wands
cards.meaning_upright: Heavy responsibility and carrying too much.
cards.meaning_reversed: Delegating, release, or collapse under pressure.

cards.name: Page of Wands
cards.meaning_upright: Curiosity, exploration, and exciting news.
cards.meaning_reversed: Impulsiveness, delays, or lack of direction.

cards.name: Knight of Wands
cards.meaning_upright: Bold action, adventure, and forward movement.
cards.meaning_reversed: Recklessness, impatience, or inconsistency.

cards.name: Queen of Wands
cards.meaning_upright: Confidence, warmth, and inspiring leadership.
cards.meaning_reversed: Insecurity, jealousy, or demanding attention.

cards.name: King of Wands
cards.meaning_upright: Visionary leadership and creative mastery.
cards.meaning_reversed: Impulsiveness, arrogance, or domineering energy.

cards.name: Ace of Cups
cards.meaning_upright: Emotional renewal, love, and an open heart.
cards.meaning_reversed: Blocked feelings or difficulty receiving love.

cards.name: Two of Cups
cards.meaning_upright: Connection, partnership, and mutual exchange.
cards.meaning_reversed: Imbalance, miscommunication, or tension in bonds.

cards.name: Three of Cups
cards.meaning_upright: Friendship, celebration, and shared support.
cards.meaning_reversed: Overindulgence or social drama.

cards.name: Four of Cups
cards.meaning_upright: Apathy, reflection, and reevaluating options.
cards.meaning_reversed: New interest, re-engagement, or a fresh offer.

cards.name: Five of Cups
cards.meaning_upright: Loss, grief, and focusing on what went wrong.
cards.meaning_reversed: Acceptance, healing, and seeing what remains.

cards.name: Six of Cups
cards.meaning_upright: Nostalgia, kindness, and gentle memories.
cards.meaning_reversed: Being stuck in the past or idealizing.

cards.name: Seven of Cups
cards.meaning_upright: Many choices, fantasies, and unclear priorities.
cards.meaning_reversed: Clarity, decision, and focus returning.

cards.name: Eight of Cups
cards.meaning_upright: Walking away to seek deeper meaning.
cards.meaning_reversed: Fear of change or returning after learning.

cards.name: Nine of Cups
cards.meaning_upright: Satisfaction, contentment, and a wish fulfilled.
cards.meaning_reversed: Overindulgence or dissatisfaction beneath comfort.

cards.name: Ten of Cups
cards.meaning_upright: Harmony, joy, and emotional fulfillment.
cards.meaning_reversed: Misalignment at home or unrealistic expectations.

cards.name: Page of Cups
cards.meaning_upright: A heartfelt message and open emotional curiosity.
cards.meaning_reversed: Emotional immaturity or mixed signals.

cards.name: Knight of Cups
cards.meaning_upright: Romance, invitations, and following the heart.
cards.meaning_reversed: Moodiness, disappointment, or chasing illusions.

cards.name: Queen of Cups
cards.meaning_upright: Empathy, intuition, and emotional care.
cards.meaning_reversed: Overwhelm, co-dependency, or poor boundaries.

cards.name: King of Cups
cards.meaning_upright: Calm compassion and emotional balance.
cards.meaning_reversed: Emotional manipulation or suppressed feelings.

cards.name: Ace of Swords
cards.meaning_upright: Clarity, truth, and a mental breakthrough.
cards.meaning_reversed: Confusion, misinformation, or cloudy judgment.

cards.name: Two of Swords
cards.meaning_upright: Stalemate, difficult choice, and guardedness.
cards.meaning_reversed: Indecision ends, truth revealed, or overload.

cards.name: Three of Swords
cards.meaning_upright: Heartbreak, sorrow, and hard truths.
cards.meaning_reversed: Healing, forgiveness, and moving on.

cards.name: Four of Swords
cards.meaning_upright: Rest, recovery, and a necessary pause.
cards.meaning_reversed: Restlessness or returning too soon.

cards.name: Five of Swords
cards.meaning_upright: Conflict, ego, and winning at a cost.
cards.meaning_reversed: Reconciliation or walking away from drama.

cards.name: Six of Swords
cards.meaning_upright: Transition, healing, and moving toward calmer waters.
cards.meaning_reversed: Difficulty moving on or carrying old baggage.

cards.name: Seven of Swords
cards.meaning_upright: Strategy, secrecy, and acting indirectly.
cards.meaning_reversed: Confession, exposure, or changing tactics.

cards.name: Eight of Swords
cards.meaning_upright: Feeling restricted by fear or self-limiting beliefs.
cards.meaning_reversed: Release, new perspective, and loosening bonds.

cards.name: Nine of Swords
cards.meaning_upright: Anxiety, worry, and sleepless nights.
cards.meaning_reversed: Relief, support, or confronting fears.

cards.name: Ten of Swords
cards.meaning_upright: An ending, painful truth, and release.
cards.meaning_reversed: Recovery, resilience, and rising again.

cards.name: Page of Swords
cards.meaning_upright: Curiosity, truth-seeking, and mental alertness.
cards.meaning_reversed: Gossip, haste, or jumping to conclusions.

cards.name: Knight of Swords
cards.meaning_upright: Direct action, speed, and decisive thinking.
cards.meaning_reversed: Impulsiveness, harshness, or rushing blindly.

cards.name: Queen of Swords
cards.meaning_upright: Discernment, independence, and clear boundaries.
cards.meaning_reversed: Coldness, bitterness, or cutting words.

cards.name: King of Swords
cards.meaning_upright: Logic, authority, and principled truth.
cards.meaning_reversed: Abuse of power or rigid, unfair judgment.

cards.name: Ace of Pentacles
cards.meaning_upright: A tangible opportunity and seed of prosperity.
cards.meaning_reversed: Missed chance or unstable foundations.

cards.name: Two of Pentacles
cards.meaning_upright: Balancing priorities and adapting to change.
cards.meaning_reversed: Overcommitment or losing balance.

cards.name: Three of Pentacles
cards.meaning_upright: Teamwork, craftsmanship, and learning by doing.
cards.meaning_reversed: Lack of collaboration or sloppy work.

cards.name: Four of Pentacles
cards.meaning_upright: Security, control, and holding on tightly.
cards.meaning_reversed: Letting go or fear of loss driving decisions.

cards.name: Five of Pentacles
cards.meaning_upright: Hardship, lack, and seeking support.
cards.meaning_reversed: Recovery, assistance, and improving conditions.

cards.name: Six of Pentacles
cards.meaning_upright: Giving and receiving with fairness and care.
cards.meaning_reversed: Strings attached or imbalance in exchange.

cards.name: Seven of Pentacles
cards.meaning_upright: Patience, long-term investment, and assessment.
cards.meaning_reversed: Impatience or doubting progress too soon.

cards.name: Eight of Pentacles
cards.meaning_upright: Practice, dedication, and improving a craft.
cards.meaning_reversed: Cutting corners or boredom with routine.

cards.name: Nine of Pentacles
cards.meaning_upright: Independence, comfort, and self-worth.
cards.meaning_reversed: Overreliance or insecurity despite success.

cards.name: Ten of Pentacles
cards.meaning_upright: Legacy, family stability, and long-term security.
cards.meaning_reversed: Instability in foundations or family tensions.

cards.name: Page of Pentacles
cards.meaning_upright: Study, new opportunity, and grounded planning.
cards.meaning_reversed: Procrastination or lack of follow-through.

cards.name: Knight of Pentacles
cards.meaning_upright: Steady progress and reliable effort.
cards.meaning_reversed: Stagnation or stubborn attachment to routine.

cards.name: Queen of Pentacles
cards.meaning_upright: Practical care, comfort, and grounded nurture.
cards.meaning_reversed: Work-home imbalance or neglecting self-care.

cards.name: King of Pentacles
cards.meaning_upright: Abundance, stability, and responsible provision.
cards.meaning_reversed: Materialism or using resources to control.
